runtime_memory_split_policy.static_manifest: PACKAGE_INTEGRITY_MANIFEST.json protects static project files only.
runtime_memory_split_policy.runtime_state: Runtime state, memory, SQLite and workspace_runtime are excluded.

truth_boundary: The manifest hashes the exact static package plan including SOURCE_PROVENANCE.json. It excludes itself, Git history, memory, runtime state, SQLite, archives, secrets, logs, backups, generator state and temporary files.
